portal.name: OneConnect Portal
portal.purpose: Raising IT requests, software installs, reporting access issues, and incident tickets.

standard_software: 2. Raise a request for the desired software and note the RITM ticket number.
3. Search for 'Software install request' on OneConnect.
4. Raise the install request referencing the previous ticket number.
5. Justification for all requests: 'Need for project'.
6. IT support team will reach out and install the tool.

ticket_prefixes.RITM: Request, Install, and Access tickets (e.g. software setups)
ticket_prefixes.INC: Incident and issue resolution tickets (e.g. extension fixes)
